title: Knock Out Sinks/Showers and Baths Unblocker, 500 ml
features: Powerful drain unblocker designed to be used with small bore pipework and sink/shower wastes and traps
Rapidly dissolves fats, grease and hair to clear blockages
Fast acting caustic liquid for easy application and correct strength dosing
Ideal to speed up slow draining plug holes and as a general maintenance to keep drains open
description: Product Description Sodium hydroxide solution specially designed to clear fat, grease and hair in kitchen sinks, baths and shower waste fittings/pipework. Where kitchen waste disposal units are fitted or connection to a septic tank, use knockout biological drain treatment. Directions Identify the sink, bath, or shower with a blockage. Apply the sodium hydroxide solution to the blockage. Allow the solution to clear the fat, grease, and hair. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. If ingested, seek medical help immediately. Do not use in kitchen waste disposal units or in connection to a septic tank. See more
